title: sparse.mm on malformed sparse tensors aborts with invalid free

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Construct sparse tensors with indices that violate sparse invariants and pass them to sparse matrix multiplication.
expected: PyTorch should reject invalid sparse tensor structure with a clear exception before native kernels corrupt memory.
observed: The process aborts with free(): invalid next size (fast).
